_about: Hand-labeled expected extraction for data/sample_transcript.txt (Northwind Logistics / HashiCorp). Each concern and action item is a keyword rubric: a list of groups, and it counts as found only if every group has at least one synonym present (case-insensitive substring) in the candidate text. Substring matching gives crude stemming for free, so 'rotat' catches both 'rotation' and 'rotated'. See src/eval.py.

technical_concerns.label: Secrets scattered across Kubernetes secrets, 1Password, and image env vars
No central audit log of who accessed secrets
Risk that app teams never adopt Vault after the integration effort
Operational burden of running self-managed Vault
Vault audit logs must land cleanly in Splunk
Managed vs self-hosted cost matters under a tight budget

action_items.label: Put together a managed HCP Vault vs self-hosted cost comparison
Provide a Splunk integration example for the audit-log format
Show how Vault provisioning can be codified in Terraform
Send a recap with next steps by end of week
